'''"Dusty" Rengo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Clantaani]] member of [[Longo Two-Guns]]' gang of criminals, who hid on the desert planet of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Rengo was wanted by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] for skimming profits from a "legitimate" protection agency on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] was able to find him just after the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
